inputs.label: Purchase Price (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Initial acquisition cost of the vehicle, including taxes and fees.

inputs.label: Residual Value (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated market value of the vehicle at the end of the holding period.

inputs.label: Holding Period (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Expected number of years the vehicle will be owned and used.

inputs.label: Annual Mileage (miles)
inputs.businessContext: Average miles driven per year, directly impacts wear and depreciation.

inputs.label: Depreciation Method
inputs.businessContext: Accounting method used to allocate depreciation expense over the holding period.

inputs.label: Annual Maintenance Cost (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Average yearly expenditure on repairs, tires, and routine servicing.

inputs.label: Fuel Efficiency (MPG)
inputs.businessContext: Miles per gallon, used to estimate fuel cost and total cost of ownership.

inputs.label: Fuel Price per Gallon (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Current or projected average fuel price for the vehicle's fuel type.

inputs.label: Annual Insurance Cost (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Yearly premium for comprehensive and liability coverage.

inputs.label: Discount Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Annual discount rate used for net present value calculations (cost of capital).

inputs.label: Vehicle Type
inputs.businessContext: Category of vehicle, influences depreciation curves and maintenance patterns.

rules.message: Residual value must be less than purchase price.
Holding period must be at least 1 year.
Fuel efficiency must be greater than 0.
Discount rate must be between 0% and 30%.

thresholds.message: Annual depreciation rate exceeds 25% — consider shorter holding period or different vehicle type.
Total cost of ownership exceeds 150% of purchase price — review operating expenses.
Residual value is less than 20% of purchase price — high depreciation risk.

formulas.name: Annual Depreciation (Straight Line)
formulas.description: Equal annual depreciation over holding period.

formulas.name: Annual Depreciation (Declining Balance)
formulas.description: Accelerated depreciation using double declining balance method.
formulas.note: Book value is updated each year; simplified as average for total.

formulas.name: Annual Depreciation (Sum of Years Digits)
formulas.description: Depreciation based on remaining life fraction.

formulas.name: Annual Fuel Cost
formulas.description: Yearly expenditure on fuel based on mileage and efficiency.

formulas.name: Total Operating Cost
formulas.description: Sum of all annual operating expenses over holding period.

formulas.name: Net Present Value of Operating Costs
formulas.description: Discounted sum of annual operating costs using discount rate.

formulas.name: Total Cost of Ownership (TCO)
formulas.description: Comprehensive cost including purchase, depreciation, and operating costs (NPV).

primary.label: Annual Depreciation Rate
primary.description: Effective annual depreciation as a percentage of purchase price.

annual_depreciation_amount.label: Annual Depreciation Amount
annual_depreciation_amount.description: Depreciation expense per year based on selected method.

total_depreciation.label: Total Depreciation over Holding Period
total_depreciation.description: Total loss in value from purchase to residual.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Excess Mileage Penalty
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Above-average mileage accelerates depreciation beyond standard curves.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Deferred Maintenance
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Skipping scheduled maintenance reduces residual value and increases long-term costs.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Market Volatility (Resale Value Risk)
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Unexpected shifts in demand for vehicle type can lower residual value.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Fuel Price Spikes
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Sudden increases in fuel cost disproportionately affect low-MPG vehicles.

suggestedActions.label: Optimize Holding Period
suggestedActions.description: Consider a shorter holding period to avoid steep depreciation after year 3-5.

suggestedActions.label: Reduce Annual Mileage
suggestedActions.description: Lower mileage preserves resale value and reduces fuel/maintenance costs.

suggestedActions.label: Implement Preventive Maintenance Schedule
suggestedActions.description: Regular servicing improves reliability and residual value.

suggestedActions.label: Select Higher MPG Vehicle
suggestedActions.description: Better fuel efficiency reduces operating cost and exposure to fuel price volatility.

suggestedActions.label: Negotiate Higher Residual Value Guarantee
suggestedActions.description: If leasing, secure a higher residual to lower depreciation cost.
